Student corner

Hold and share your proof

Connect your wallet

Connect the address where institutions issue your certificates. This demo does not yet index all your certificates automatically, but you can still verify any certificate ID tied to this wallet.

How to use this portal

  • Ask your institution to issue your certificate on-chain.
  • You will receive a certificate PDF with a QR pointing to this portal.
  • Anyone scanning the QR can instantly verify authenticity against the blockchain.
